name: Chicken Breast with Dried Apricots and Cranberries
recipeIngredient: 1 large red onion, halved and sliced lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Heat white wine in a saucepan until boiling.
3. Remove from heat, add dried apricots, and soak for 10 minutes.
4. Drain the mixture, reserving both separately.
5. Arrange chicken pieces, skin-side up, in a large, heavy casserole.
6. Sprinkle with onion, ground coriander, ground cumin, paprika, dry mustard, cinnamon, salt, and pepper.
7. Add plumped dried apricots and cranberries to the casserole.
8. Combine reserved white wine and chicken broth.
9. Pour over all ingredients in the casserole.
10. Cover tightly and bake until chicken is very tender, 50 to 60 minutes.
